name: Filter: Pixel Stretch
description: Freeze a photo at a threshold line and smear that column of pixels across the frame — set where it starts, how far it spreads, and which way it runs. Works live.
a11yLabel: Pixel-stretch smear of the chosen image

inputs.label: Image
inputs.help: Pick a photo or upload your own. It's processed on your device — the pixels never leave the browser. Or hit “Go live” on the canvas to smear your camera.

inputs.label: Direction
inputs.help: Which way the frozen column of pixels smears across the frame.

inputs.label: Threshold start
inputs.help: Where the photo freezes and the smear begins — the position of the sampled column along the stretch direction.

inputs.label: Spread
inputs.help: How far the smear reaches from the threshold toward the edge. 0 leaves the photo untouched; 100 stretches all the way to the edge.

inputs.label: Zoom & Position
inputs.help: Zoom scales the photo up; X / Y pan it within the frame (like object-position). Drag a label or type a value.
